summary: Run full corpus re-embed; sample random chunks and verify chunk_embeddings.model='ollama/nomic-embed-text' and dim=768

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Pivoted from Google text-embedding-005 to ollama/nomic-embed-text (768d). Reason: user wants to avoid external API + bill; Carnice-27b is not usable for embeddings (decoder-only, 4608d, ~500x slower). nomic-embed-text was already the de-facto local embedder via ollama and produced the existing 120 chunk_embeddings rows. This ticket will (a) remove the Google-specific code from previous Phase 2 tickets 8882a4a1/3800c933, (b) run --reindex against ollama for all 2531 chunks to pin the provider-prefixed model tag on every row.

resolution.note: Full re-embed complete: 2531/2531 chunks through ollama/nomic-embed-text in ~15 min on GPU, 0 errors. Verification: all 2531 rows tagged 'ollama/nomic-embed-text' at dim=768, unit-norm, 3072B blobs, 0 FK orphans against nodes(type='chunk'). Google provider code reverted in the same commit.
